'''''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 3''' was the third issue of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] magazine, published in [[December]] [[2002]] as part of the monthly installment of the ''Star Wars Adventures'' membership kit. The issue centered around [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"Jedi Through the Ages"
*"He's the Wan!"
*"Following the Code"
*"You Make the Scene"
*"Arena Attack!"
*Pull-out Poster
*"The Way of the Lightsaber"
*"The Path of the Jedi"
*"Test Your Jedi Knowledge"
*"Facing the Followers of the Sith"
*"Get Inside a Jedi Starfighter"
*"Jedi Jokes"
*Answer Key
